const validDomainsSchema = z
  .array(
    z
      .string()
      .min(4, t('error:invalid_between_num', { name: 'Domain', min: 4, max: maxLength.field }))
      .max(maxLength.field, t('error:invalid_between_num', { name: 'Domain', min: 4, max: maxLength.field }))
      .regex(/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*\.[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$/i, { message: t('error:invalid_domain') })
      .superRefine(refineWithType((s) => /^[a-z0-9].*[a-z0-9]$/i.test(s) && s.includes('.'), 'invalid_domain'))
      .transform((str) => str.toLowerCase().trim()),
  )
  .optional();

type HandlerResponse<
  T extends Partial<Record<StatusCode, StandardSchemaV1>> = Partial<
    Record<StatusCode, StandardSchemaV1>
  >,
> = PromiseOr<
  {
    [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends StandardSchemaV1
      ? TypedResponse<
          JSONParsed<StandardSchemaV1.InferOutput<T[K]>>,
          Num<K> extends StatusCode ? Num<K> : never
        >
      : never;
  }[keyof T]
>;

const scopesSection = scopes.length > 0 ? `

Requested Scopes

    ${scopes.map((scope) => `
  • ${escapeHtml(scope)}
    • `).join('\n ')}
` : ''
